payload.body:
Agent implementation completed and the managed branch was pushed.

I’ll replace the sequence shortcut entirely with an exact `⌘B` chord. I’ll update the shortcut registry so modifier chords are modeled explicitly, keep `⌘B` available to editors/text fields, remove the old `S` then `B` behavior, and update the tooltip, documentation, and conflict coverage.The old sequence has been removed. The registry now supports exact modifier chords, and the sidebar action requires Command with no Ctrl, Alt, or Shift; it also deliberately does not consume `⌘B` inside editable fields, so Markdown bold remains available. I’m running shortcut, UI, type, and build verification now.Behavior, typecheck, and lint all pass; the formatter requested one mechanical line-wrap in the shortcut registry, which is now applied. I’m finishing with the full desktop/UI suites and production build.Updated the sidebar shortcut to `⌘B` only.

- Removed the `S`, then `B` sequence.
- `Ctrl+B`, plain `B`, and `⌘⇧B` do not toggle.
- `⌘B` remains available for bold formatting inside editable fields.
- Updated tooltip and architecture documentation to show `⌘B`.
- Added exact modifier and conflict tests.

Verification passed: typecheck, lint, formatting, desktop build, 74 desktop tests, and 40 UI tests.

Changes remain uncommitted for Cycle’s handoff workflow. Refresh/restart the running app after the branch is updated.
